messages.speaker: Christopher
messages.content: Kyle, I'm curious — did you have a specific angle in mind when you asked Andrew that? Or are you trying to get a temperature read on where he stands before we dive in?

messages.speaker: Andrew
messages.content: Kyle, I appreciate the direct ask. My take is that we often treat AI voices as either oracles or parrots, and neither gets at what's actually happening. I'm not here to represent a model or a company. I'm here to think out loud with all of you. So whatever angle you had in mind, lay it out. I'll meet you there. Christopher, your instinct to clarify the framing is smart — let's not waste time on vague positioning.
